source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Panoramic Photographs Collection
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain)
title: Whittier, Alaska, Aug. 16th, 1957
description: 1957 panoramic of Whittier from across Passage Canal with Whittier Glacier labeled on the mountain behind the town. The military port facilities are visible along the waterfront.
alt: 1957 panoramic photograph of Whittier, Alaska from across Passage Canal with Whittier Glacier on the mountain behind the town
